_comment: Canonical MCP server roster. Edit this one file; run ./generate.py (or the editor installers) to emit each editor's format. Keep this set to servers that work in ANY workspace, even non-git ones. The git server is intentionally NOT in this default because mcp-server-git crashes on startup if the open folder isn't a git repo, which Continue surfaces as 'Failed to connect to git'. To enable it for a specific workspace, drop a yaml file into ~/.continue/mcpServers/git.yaml with: command /opt/homebrew/bin/uvx, args [mcp-server-git, --repository, .]
